sources.title: Racer and the Jailbird (SPANNENDER KRIMI auf Deutsch komplett, Neo Noir, ganze Krimi Thriller Filme)

metadata.Plot: When Gino meets racing driver Bénédicte, it's love at first sight. Passionate. Unconditional. Fiery. But Gino hides has a secret. The kind of secret that can endanger your life and the lives of those ones around you. Gino and Bénédicte will have to fight against fate, reason and their own weaknesses to save their love.
metadata.Writer: Thomas Bidegain, Noé Debré, Michaël R. Roskam
metadata.Actors: Matthias Schoenaerts, Adèle Exarchopoulos, Eric De Staercke
